channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Votre smartphone Pixel peut trouver ce qui cloche avec la connexion Bluetooth, voici comment
item.description: Le menu d'assistance des Pixel de Google s'enrichit d'un sous-menu dédié au problème de connexions Bluetooth avec vos accessoires.

item.title: Wikipedia bans AI-generated articles
item.description: Wikipedia will no longer allow editors to write or rewrite articles using AI. The update, which was added to Wikipedia's guidelines late last week, cites the tendency for AI-written articles to violate "several of Wikipedia's core content policies" as the reason for the ban. The change applies to the English version of Wikipedia and will […]

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which starts today and runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold […]

item.title: Forget the AI Armageddon—quantum computing is the real threat to digital security
item.description: While AI grabs headlines, quantum computing quietly threatens to upend digital security foundations.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, March 27 (game #1020)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, March 27 (game #754)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, March 27 (game #1523)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: A huge new update for Dying Light: The Beast has arrived, making the zombie title 'almost incomparable to the game that was released in September'
item.description: Restored Land is Dying Light: The Beast's massive new update and almost reinvents how to complete the game —'All actions have permanent consequences'.

item.title: New Netflix show Something Very Bad is Going to Happen was nearly shot like Adolescence — but instead it is the horror version of Uncut Gems
item.description: Episode 7 of new Netflix series Something Very Bad is Going to Happen was supposed to have the classic Adolescence one-shot — but instead, we've got the Uncut Gems of horror.

item.title: Meta | Le métavers de Zuckerberg se meurt à petit feu
item.description: Il y a cinq ans, Mark Zuckerberg proclamait que l’avenir de Facebook serait le métavers. Ce serait un monde numérique immersif – la réalité virtuelle – où tous pourraient travailler, jouer et se rencontrer, disait-il. Pour nommer le destin de son entreprise, M. Zuckerberg l’a rebaptisée Meta.

item.title: En 2026, le smartphone moyen à une meilleure batterie que celle du Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Une étude de Counterpoint révèle que la capacité moyenne des batteries des smartphones a fortement augmenté en un an. Avec un leader très clair sur ce marché de l'endurance.

item.title: WhatsApp : adieu la galère du stockage et du double téléphone, cette mise à jour change tout
item.description: Entre l'arrivée de l'IA pour vos photos, la fin du casse-tête des deux smartphones et une gestion du stockage enfin intelligente, l'application de messagerie de Meta s'offre une cure de jouvence. Meta déploie quelques nouveautés qui vont simplifier votre quotidien numérique.

item.title: Why hiring the weirdos works
item.description: When you’re building at breakneck speed, hiring a trusted team is crucial for an early-stage startup. Bland CEO and co-founder Isaiah Granet has tactical advice on how the company managed to find hidden talent in unlikely places.

item.title: How to watch Turkey vs Romania: Free Streams & TV Channels for World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier
item.description: All the ways to watch Turkey vs Romania live streams online – including for FREE – in the decisive World Cup 2026 playoff qualifier at Besiktas Stadium.

item.title: Senators are pushing to find out how much electricity data centers actually use
item.description: On Thursday, senators Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Josh Hawley (R-MO) sent a letter to the Energy Information Administration (EIA) urging it to begin collecting "comprehensive, annual energy-use disclosures" on data centers, as reported by Wired. According to the letter, data on how much electricity data centers are consuming is "essential for accurate grid planning and […]...

item.title: J’ai testé le DJI Avata 360, un drone FPV qui voit dans toutes les directions
item.description: Deux capteurs 1/1,1 pouce de 64 Mpix, vidéo 360° en 8K@60fps, détection d'obstacles omnidirectionnelle, transmission O4+, objectif à f/1,9 : l'Avata 360 ne ressemble à aucun drone FPV connu. Des marais de Guérande aux pêcheries de St-Nazaire, j'ai vérifié ce qu'il a dans le ventre.

item.title: Un écran PC de 27″ (165 Hz et 1 ms) à seulement 99 € ? Oui, c’est possible grâce à cette offre
item.description: Le Xiaomi G27i était déjà un écran abordable au moment de sa sortie, mais il l'est encore plus grâce à cette promotion de 80 euros.

item.title: Meilleur vélo électrique (VAE) : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Difficile de s'y retrouver dans la jungle des vélos électriques (VAE). Pour vous aider à choisir celui qu'il vous faut, nous avons testé et sélectionné les meilleurs vélos électriques du marché.

item.title: Docusign promises 'a new generation of smarter, actionable contracts' with AI-powered review and approval tools
item.description: It takes 4-6 weeks and £1,300 in human capital to create a new agreement – Docusign wants to vastly improve that.

item.title: The Sony Afeela Was Doomed to Fail
item.description: A six-year EV rollout ends with a thud.

item.title: The LiberNovo Omni office chair is 'something very different' and we absolutely loved it — now it's massively dropped in price at Amazon
item.description: An electronically adjustable office chair with all-day comfort - and it can be yours for a great deal.

item.title: DJI Now Has a Cheaper 360 Drone Than Insta360, but the U.S. Won’t Get It
item.description: Traditional drone flyers may prefer the DJI Avata 360 over the Antigravity A1, if you can find it in the U.S.

item.title: USPS transportation surcharge will make these types of packages more expensive to ship from the post office
item.description: First-Class stamps will be spared another price hike for now, but the U.S. Postal Service will soon impose a temporary transportation-related fee. The era of communicating by snail mail is long gone, and the United States Postal Service (USPS) has suffered in its wake.

item.title: A major hacking tool has leaked online, putting millions of iPhones at risk. Here’s what you need to know.
item.description: Here’s what we know, and what you need to know, about Coruna and DarkSword, two advanced iPhone hacking tools discovered by security researchers. DarkSword has now leaked online.

item.title: 'A sophisticated threat that is quietly reshaping the economics of digital fraud': How hackers are employing virtual cloud phones to power major scams
item.description: Cloud phones are the latest tool to be used against banking app users and the security community should take notice.

item.title: I've looked through literally hundreds of listings in the Newegg Spring Sale — these are the 12 best deals on PCs, laptops, components, and more
item.description: Forget Amazon - Newegg's Spring Sale is where it's at for gamers today

item.title: WhatsApp fait le plein de nouveautés sur iOS et Android
item.description: La messagerie instantanée est en train de déployer une liste de nouveautés digne de Noël. L’appli va vous aider à mieux gérer le stockage de votre smartphone, retoucher vos photos avec l’IA et autoriser deux comptes sur un seul iPhone.

item.title: What Do You Mean Fox McCloud Is in the ‘Super Mario Galaxy’ Movie
item.description: Illumination and Nintendo have adopted a 'sure, what the hell' approach after the success of the first film.

item.title: « Prêt pour la nouvelle révolution mobile ? » : Free tease une grosse nouveauté pour ses abonnés mobiles
item.description: Ce jeudi, Free a convié Frandroid à découvrir sa "nouvelle révolution mobile" qui sera dévoilée par Nicolas Thomas, directeur général de Free. La grande annonce est prévue le mardi 31 mars prochain.

item.title: Why a two-seater robotaxi makes more sense than you think
item.description: When Tesla revealed the Cybercab in 2024, many people were baffled by the automaker's decision to make it a two-seater. I had similar thoughts when I first saw it at the LA Auto Show later that year: What kind of taxi has only two seats? Once you get above a tuktuk, that's an asinine idea […]

item.title: L’IA de Google peut désormais créer des musiques de 3 minutes avec un simple prompt
item.description: Google étend les capacités de Lyria, son IA chargée des créations audio. Elle peut désormais composer des morceaux jusqu'à 3 minutes de long.

item.title: How to use Apple's Playlist Playground to make AI-generated mixes
item.description: With the release of iOS 26.4, Apple Music's Playlist Playground can now generate playlists with the help of AI. Best of all, you don't need an Apple Intelligence-capable iPhone to take advantage of the new feature. As long as you're a US Apple Music subscriber with your language set to English, you can start using Playlist Playground right now. Here's how to get started. How to create playlists using Playlist PlaygroundA pair of screenshots showing off Apple Music's new Playlist Playground feature. Igor Bonifacic for EngadgetFor the time being, there are two ways to access Playlist Playground....

item.title: Micron and SanDisk stocks are getting pummeled this week. Is the memory chip rally over?
item.description: Investors in fast-rising memory storage stocks may be seeking to lock in profits after news from Google’s parent company appeared to have rattled the industry. Thanks for the memory?

item.title: HBO Max dropped the Harry Potter TV show trailer ahead of its UK launch — and the show's magical release date will delight Potterheads
item.description: Harry Potter has a first-look trailer and a confirmed release date at HBO Max.

item.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
item.description: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

item.title: Sony has shut down Dark Outlaw Games one year after its founding and while it was reportedly 'still in the early stages' of developing its project
item.description: Sony has shut down Dark Outlaw Games one year after its founding, and is also making cuts across mobile game development.

item.title: Fnac casse le prix du Google Pixel 10 Pro XL, en pack avec une enceinte Bang & Olufsen
item.description: Il arrive souvent que Fnac fasse des packs de plusieurs produits à prix cassé, c'est comme ça qu'on retrouve le smartphone Google Pixel 10 Pro XL avec l'enceinte Bluetooth Bang & Olufsen Beosound Explore pour 799 euros au lieu de 1 548 euros le tout, après reprise.

item.title: Le mystère de la page maudite qui fait complètement crasher les Samsung Galaxy
item.description: Un bug étrange touche les smartphones Samsung Galaxy sous puce Exynos : l'ouverture d'un site web spécifique provoque des redémarrages intempestifs, et parfois même une extinction pure et simple.

item.title: HBO Max finally launches in the UK and Ireland
item.description: It’s been a long wait, but HBO Max has finally arrived in the UK and Ireland, rounding off the streaming service’s European expansion. Oscar-winners One Battle After Another and Sinners are both available to stream at launch, alongside Max Original shows like The Pitt. Season three of Euphoria arrives in April, and HBO Max is also home to mega-franchises like The Lord of the Rings and Harry Potter, both of which are celebrating their 25th anniversaries in 2026. Starting today, March 26, UK audiences can choose from three plans. Basic with Ads costs £5 per month, and offers all HBO shows and se...

item.title: Les configurations recommandées de Forza Horizon 6 sont une excellente nouvelle pour les joueurs PC
item.description: Forza Horizon 6 est la prochaine claque graphique de ce début d'année 2026. Le jeu de course en monde ouvert de Playground Games vient de dévoiler ses fonctionnalités et configurations PC, avec quelques surprises à la clé.

item.title: Using a VPN May Subject You to NSA Spying
item.description: US lawmakers are pressing Tulsi Gabbard to reveal whether using a VPN that connects to overseas servers can strip Americans of their constitutional protections against warrantless surveillance.

item.title: Cohere launches an open-source voice model specifically for transcription
item.description: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

item.title: HBO Max en avril 2026 : La bande-annonce de la série Harry Potter vous a plu ? Voici quelques films et séries pour patienter
item.description: En attendant Harry Potter, il y a encore de belles choses à voir sur HBO Max. La plateforme de streaming vient de dévoiler son catalogue d'avril avec le retour attendu d'une série.

item.title: OpenAI : le « mode adulte » de ChatGPT définitivement à l’arrêt
item.description: Après Sora, le « mode adulte » de ChatGPT : OpenAI n'en a pas terminé avec son nettoyage de printemps. Après l'avoir promis pour ce début d'année puis reporté, la start-up suspend indéfiniment le développement de la capacité de ChatGPT à générer des discussions érotiques.

item.title: We found the best Apple deals from Amazons Spring Sale — save on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: How to watch Australia vs. Cameroon online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Australia vs. Cameroon in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Protect your devices from AI scams, malware, and identity theft for under $30 — Norton 360 Premium is 'the antivirus deal to go for' in Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: Protect your digital life for under $30 — Norton 360 Premium is now 70% off in Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Amazons Big Spring Sale is surprisingly good: We found 111+ deals on Apple, DJI, Sony, and Dyson
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale is back from March 25 to 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and grab Kindles for $95.

item.title: Of all the noise-cancelling headphones I've tested, these are the 3 I'd spend my money on — and there's no room for Apple or Bose
item.description: If you're going to get a pair of noise-cancelling headphones, I'd recommend picking up one of these three models.
